title: ARI dashboard AppState (GET /state)
description: Response of GET /state, built inline by routes.py:219-666 and consumed by frontend/src/services/api.ts fetchState + context/AppContext.tsx (5s poll). Mirrors frontend/src/types/index.ts AppState (lines 87-129). Only the tail keys the builder sets unconditionally (routes.py:564-575 running_pid/is_running/exit_code/running/pid/status_label, plus the badge llm_model at 577-590) are marked 'required'; everything gated behind the _ckpt_valid block or a present cost_summary.json is optional (additive-subset policy). 'running'/'pid' are JS-compat aliases of 'is_running'/'running_pid'. Convention: bare payload dict serialized by _json (routes.py:1190-1197); NOTE the /state 200 response omits Access-Control-Allow-Origin (routes.py:662-666), a documented CORS inconsistency (022 does not change it).

cost.description: Parsed cost_summary.json object (CostSummary), NOT a number; only present when the file exists.
